title: The Glitch in the Family Photo
narration:
I found a 1994 polaroid of my parents that breaks reality.

They were at a restaurant. I was flipping through the wedding album when the background caught my eye.

A man stands behind them. He is wearing sleek, modern wireless earbuds. They didn't exist thirty years ago.

I checked the physical print with a loupe. The man's face is blurred, like a corrupted digital file on paper.

Tell me how a physical 1994 print has a digital rendering glitch.
